title: Consumer
description: A Consumer represents a developer or machine using the API. Consumers are used with authentication plugins to identify and control API access.

id.description: The unique identifier of the Consumer.

username.description: The unique username of the Consumer. At least one of username or custom_id must be specified.

custom_id.description: A custom identifier for the Consumer. At least one of username or custom_id must be specified.

tags.description: An optional set of strings for grouping and filtering.

created_at.description: Unix epoch timestamp of when the entity was created.

updated_at.description: Unix epoch timestamp of when the entity was last updated.
